title: viola × florariensis
intro: Viola × florariensis, also known as the hybrid violet, is a cross between the species Viola sororia and Viola pedunculata. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × florariensis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Viola × florariensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for a variety of uses in traditional medicine.
